free_text: Mass and kinetic energy distributions of fragments
of fragments at the fission of U-235 by thermal
neutrons were used on the graduation of energy scale
It was assumed, that at Np-237 fission by 1.0-MeV
neutrons the average number of prompt neutrons emitted
by the individual fragments depends on the fragment
mass exactly as in case of thermal-neutron Pu-239
fission (V.F.Apalin+) and NU was based of results of
Statistical errors of mass and energy distributions
here Ym- mass-yield of fragments with given
n-alpha number of the registered fragments
at the fission of Np-237 by neutrons
